mnemonics: TEST-P for Test Components: T - Test Planning, E - Environment Setup, S - Scripting, T - Test Execution, P - Performance & Reporting
keyPoints: Test components include test planning, environment setup, test scripting, test execution, and performance/reporting
Cloud testing requires consideration of scalability, security, and multi-tenancy aspects
Automated testing is crucial for efficient cloud application validation
commonMistakes: Neglecting to test for scalability and elasticity in cloud environments
Forgetting to include security testing for cloud-specific vulnerabilities
Assuming traditional testing methods are sufficient without cloud-specific adaptations
